case_title: ANDREW BARNETT et al VS. BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTUFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARNETT, ANDREW BARNETT, JILL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR A REFUND. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,155.00 FILED BY BARNETT, ANDREW BARNETT, JILL AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
